comment_draft: Solid work. One thing most folks don't realize until they're in a claim: a sudden burst is usually covered, slow long-term seepage usually isn't. Documenting the moment you found it is huge.

comment_draft: Nice build. Building-code-upgrade coverage (Ord & Law) is one of the most-overlooked endorsements when reconstruction starts.
Solid. Heads-up for homeowners: pool screen + cage replacement after a storm runs $8-15K — make sure your 'other structures' limit isn't sitting at 2% of dwelling.
